Greg Smith

Member of Parliament for Mid Buckinghamshire

I'm Greg Smith MP, your local Conservative Member of Parliament for Mid Buckinghamshire. Covering the market towns of Princes Risborough, Wendover, and the surrounding villages. I live here in Chearsley, with my young family, and want to make our beautiful part of the country an even better place to live, work, and bring up a family. I'm here to help, so please don't hesitate to get in-touch.

Want to stay up to date?

The information you provide is used in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy Policy. By clicking this button you agree to your information being used in accordance with that policy.

Save our Mid Bucks fire stations

In just a few months of taking control, the Liberal Democrat Chaired Fire Authority has announced plans to consult on closing Great Missenden Fire Station, Stokenchurch Fire Station and removing Haddenham’s only fire engine. 

Under their plans nearly a third of Buckinghamshire fire engines would be cut.  This is a dangerous and entirely unnecessary plan that Greg Smith MP and local Conservatives are fighting vigorously.

There is no case for these cuts. The previous Conservative-run Fire Authority rejected these proposals.

Sign the petition
